Global (All).title: Rise in global tensions between nations
Global (All).summary: Tensions have been escalating between several world powers, sparking fears of a potential conflict.

Global (All).title: Cyberattack on major corporations
Global (All).summary: A severe cyberattack has hit several major corporations, compromising sensitive data and disrupting operations.

Global (All).title: Protests over human rights abuses
Global (All).summary: Protests have erupted in several countries over allegations of human rights abuses by governments, with clashes between protesters and security forces.

United States.title: Escalating Tensions between US and Iran after a US drone was shot down
United States.summary: The US drone was shot down over international waters in the Persian Gulf, further straining relations between the two countries.

United States.title: Gunman Kills 6 in US Mass Shooting in California
United States.summary: A gunman opened fire at two locations in the California city of Half Moon Bay, killing six people and injuring several others.

United States.title: Protests Erupt in Washington D.C. over Supreme Court Ruling on Abortion
United States.summary: Large crowds gathered in front of the US Supreme Court building to protest the overturning of Roe v. Wade, with some clashes between protesters and police reported.

South Korea.title: Seoul and Busan impose fine on people without masks in public places
South Korea.summary: To contain the COVID-19 omicron variant, Seoul and Busan have imposed fines on people without masks in public places from May 10. This move is part of South Korea's efforts to contain the spread of COVID-19.

South Korea.title: N. Korea conducts underwater nuclear explosion test
South Korea.summary: North Korea has announced that it conducted an underwater nuclear explosion test. This move raises concerns about N. Korea's nuclear capabilities.

South Korea.title: S.Korean military to launch new Aegis destroyer by 2027
South Korea.summary: South Korea's military is planning to launch a new Aegis destroyer by 2027 to strengthen its defenses against potential threats from North Korea.

Japan.title: North Korea Fires Missile Over Japan
Japan.summary: North Korea has fired a ballistic missile into the Sea of Japan, sparking widespread concern in the region. The US, Japan, and South Korea have condemned the launch, which raises tensions in the region.

Japan.title: Japan's PM Fumio Kishida Visits US, Discusses Security
Japan.summary: Japanese Prime Minister Fumio Kishida has visited the US, meeting with President Joe Biden to discuss regional security and cooperation. The visit comes as tensions remain high in the Asia-Pacific region.

Japan.title: Protests Erupt in Japan Over New Nuclear Power Plant
Japan.summary: Protests have erupted in Japan over the planned construction of a new nuclear power plant, with environmental activists and local residents expressing concerns about safety and the potential impact on the local community.
